A live progress bar for backups and restores — plus clearer error messages.

## Added
- **Live progress bar.** A full-width bar across the bottom of each container, VM and flash card now fills in real time (in your accent colour) during both a **backup** and a **restore**. It is driven by restic's own progress, streamed to the WebUI over Server-Sent Events — open the UI mid-backup and the bar is already moving. While restic reports no number yet, the bar shows an indeterminate animation.

## Fixed
- **Clearer restic errors.** When restic fails, BombVault now surfaces the line that names the actual cause (e.g. *"Detected data corruption while saving blob …: hash mismatch"*) instead of restic's generic *"…please open an issue…"* trailer, so the WebUI tells you what really went wrong.

Image: `ghcr.io/junkerderprovinz/bombvault:1.4.0` (also `:1`, `:1.4`, `:latest`), multi-arch (amd64 + arm64).
